summary: Iranian forces have deployed a modified Ketral loitering munition with an X-shaped tail fin and rear rocket booster, part of a new group of small loitering drones. Ukrainian forces struck Russian positions in Kursk, destroying FPV launch sites, depots, antennas, and shelters, while Russian Army aviation used LMUR missiles to hit a Ukrainian UAV launch point in Kharkiv. Ukrainian FPV units destroyed multiple Russian drones, including Domaha, Darts, Chaklun, and others, and eliminated a Russian propagandist in Donetsk. Russian forces attempted a failed assault using MT-LBs and motorcycles near Sievierodonetsk, and Iranian-backed militias launched fiber-optic FPV drone attacks on U.S. bases in Iraq. Both sides are using advanced anti-drone systems like "Yolka" and "Elka" for kinetic interceptions, with Russian forces employing log-periodic antennas to enhance FPV drone range and resistance to jamming.
